title: More Metal Grates
body:
# About
Add some grates made by Metal.

Copper grates were added in MC1.21, so I wanted to add various grates other than copper.I know there is a wooden grate in another mod, so this time I wanted to add a metal grate.

It is basically made in the same way as copper grates by arranging blocks, with the exception of netherite, which is made using ingots instead of blocks.
If you use a stone cutter, you get four times the amount.

Amount that can be crafted (every 4 blocks, or every 1 block when using a stonecutter)
## Amount that can be crafted from blocks (every 4 blocks, or every 1 block when using a stonecutter)
- Amethyst
  
  1
- Quartz,Smooth Quartz,Lapis,Redstone
  
  4
- Iron,Gold,Emerald
  
  16
- Diamond
  
  64
### Amount that can be crafted from ingots (every 4 ingots, or every 1 ingot when using a stonecutter)
- Netherite
  
  32

# Compats Copper Grates Bubble(Only Fabric Version)

Version 3.0.0 and later are compatible with [Copper Grates Bubble](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-grates-bubble).
Bubbles can now pass through blocks added by this mod, as well as blocks that inherit from GrateBlock from other mods, in addition to copper grates.
